headings.strategy: Unbounded provides a structural, Web3, blocky aesthetic perfect for a crypto bank. Use tracking-tight for tight letter spacing on large sizes.

body.strategy: Manrope is highly legible and geometric, balancing the brutalism of Unbounded.

mono_data.strategy: MANDATORY for all crypto prices, wallet balances, and chart axis labels. Ensures numbers align vertically.

colors.strategy: Tactical Minimalism. Deep Obsidian base for a high-end vault feel. Pure White for clarity. Electric Green for positive actions (deposit, buy, price up). Crimson for negative (withdraw, sell, price down).

visual_enhancers.gradients: BANNED. Do not use generic background gradients. Use flat solid colors for structural integrity.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal. Use 1px solid strokes (border-white/10) instead of soft drop shadows to define boundaries.
visual_enhancers.textures: Include a subtle SVG noise overlay fixed to the viewport background (opacity 2-3%) to remove digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: For Sticky Headers/Navs only: bg-[#0A0A0A]/70, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-white/10. NO complete transparency.

components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-sm). Primary buttons: bg-[#00E599] text-black font-semibold. Hover: brightness-110 and scale-105.
components.cards: Flat, sharp rectangular. bg-surface, 1px border-white/10. No drop shadows. High density.
components.tables: Dense rows. Hover states MUST explicitly set text color (hover:bg-white/5 hover:text-white). No zebra striping.
components.inputs_forms: Shadcn based. Dark background, border-white/20. Focus: ring-1 ring-[#00E599] border-[#00E599].
components.charts: Recharts via Shadcn. Tooltip must have dark glassmorphism background. Green/Red stroke colors for line charts.

grids_layouts.dashboard_grid: High Density Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized.
grids_layouts.marketing_grid: Asymmetric bento grid for landing page features. Mix span-4, span-8 sizes.
grids_layouts.spacing: Generous container padding. Tailwind scale: p-6, p-8. Ensure text doesn't touch borders.

motion.interactions: Smooth transitions for hover: transition-transform duration-200 ease-out. Do not use 'transition-all'.
motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for table rows and cards on dashboard load.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG. Minimum 4.5:1 for normal text.
accessibility.focus: High contrast focus rings on all interactive elements.
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY data-testid attributes on ALL interactive and key data elements (e.g., login-submit-button, wallet-balance, crypto-buy-btn).

media.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react). Use duotone or regular weight for a high-end technical look.
media.3d_libraries: Use 'react-tsparticles' for a subtle, slow-moving constellation/node network on the landing page background to represent blockchain/crypto. Keep opacity very low.

image_urls.description: Abstract colored shapes on dark background. Use for Landing Page hero background.
Pyramid with bitcoins. Use for Crypto Trading feature section on Landing Page.
Professional trader at computer. Use for 'Pro Trading' or testimonial section.
Secure vintage safety deposit boxes. Use for 'Bank-grade Security' feature section.
Tech sponsor logo (retro Apple on black). Use for partner/sponsor marquee or list.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a React.js (JavaScript, NO TypeScript) application with Tailwind CSS and Shadcn.
Do not build a Datepicker or Dialog from scratch. Heavily customize Shadcn components.
Always explicitly set text color on hover states (e.g., hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white).
Run: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react react-tsparticles tsparticles recharts
Use Recharts for the Trading Dashboard to plot live CoinGecko data.
Dashboard container should NOT be center-aligned.
Use Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl) for sticky navs and modal overlays.
Add 'data-testid' to EVERY button, input, and important text node.
The UI should feel like a secure Swiss bank adapted for Web3. Rigid, authoritative, high-contrast. Use borders instead of shadows.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Create depth with z-index hierarchy and glass-morphism.
Dark colors look good independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
NEVER use universal transition (transition: all). Use specific properties (transition: transform 0.2s ease).
DO NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is banned).
Use sharp or slightly rounded buttons with micro-animations.
NEVER use AI assistant emojis for icons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) must NOT use placeholder text. Use the provided image URLs.
Components MUST use named exports. Pages MUST use default exports.
Use sonner for toasts (/app/src/components/ui/sonner.js). Note the .js extension as this is a JavaScript project.
